All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractPerformanceSimulator
 
AbstractPerformanceSimulator.Callable1<T>
 
AbstractPerformanceSimulator.Simulator
 
AccessControl
Supports Access Controls with a set of Access Control Entries
AccessControl.Map
Provides easy access to the Map class for Swagger documentation
AccessControlMigrator
Implements the IAccessControlService for IZ Gateway.
AccessControlRepository
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for AccessControls.
AccessControlService
Implements the IAccessControlService for IZ Gateway.
AccessGroup
DynamoDB entity for AccessGroup, representing an access control group record.
AccessGroupRepository
Repository for managing AccessGroup entities in DynamoDB.
ADSController
Controller for Automated Data Submission to CDC
ADSController.ADSControllerConfiguration
 
ADSController.Execute<T>
An interface that can run a FileSender task
ADSErrorResponse
 
ADSUtils
Utility functions supporting Automated Data Submission (ADS) services in IZ Gateway Hub
AllowedUser
DynamoDB entity for AllowedUser, representing a user allowed to send to a destination.
AllowedUserRepository
Repository for managing AllowedUser entities in DynamoDB.
AppController
Provides basic /rest API calls for application information.
Application
The main application class for IZ Gateway.
Application.JulInit
Class to initialize Java Util Logging (JUL) to route through SLF4J.
ArrayHistogram
 
AzureBlob
Represents an Blob in Azure Blob Stoorage
AzureBlobStorageSender
This class implements the FileSender interface to Azure and the Azurite Azure emulator.
BaseGatewayController
Base controller class that contains common functionality shared between HubWSDLController and CDCWSDLController.
CDCWSDLController
 
CertificateStatus
This class records status of a given certificate wrt to OCSP checks
CertificateStatusRepository
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for CertificateStatus.
CertificateStatusService
Service for managing certificate statuses for Revocation checking.
CsvFilenameComponents
Immutable value object holding the parsed components of a CSV ADS submission filename, plus any validation errors collected by CsvFilenameValidator.validate(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).
CsvFilenameValidator
Utility class for parsing and validating CSV ADS (Automated Data Submission) filenames.
DbController
This class provides APIs to manage information in the database.
DbController.DbControllerConfiguration
Configuration for the DB Controller.
DenyListRecord
DynamoDB entity for DenyListRecord, representing a user denied access to IZ Gateway.
DenyListRecordRepository
Repository for managing DenyListRecord entities in DynamoDB.
Destination
A Destination stored in a Dynamo Database
DestinationRepository
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for Destinations.
DestinationService
Destination Service provides access to the Destination Repository.
DexConfiguration
 
DexFileUploadController
This is a Mock File Upload Controller that duplicates the API supplied by the CDC DEX endpoint.
DexFileUploadController.AuthenticationException
An exception to throw on a failure to authenticate
DEXStorageSender
This class implements the FileSender interface to Azure and the Azurite Azure emulator.
DynamoDbRepositoryFactory
Creates the necessary Beans for DynamoDB repository access These are the clients that are used to access any DynamoDB repositories
ElasticConfiguration
 
ElasticRepository
 
ElasticStatusRepository
A repository collecting data from a Search of an Elastic index.
EndpointStatus
This class reports on the status of a destination at a given point in time.
EndpointStatus.Map
Map of statushistory entities reported by /statushistory API
EndpointStatusRepository
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for EndpointStatus.
Event
Supports Event Tracking
Event.Map
Provides easy access to the Map class for Swagger documentation
EventRepository
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for Events.
ExceptionHandling
This class is used to support ExceptionHandling for controllers
FileSender
Contract for Blob Storage sender interface to enable reuse of this with other blob stores (e.g., Azure, S3 bucket).
FileType
DynamoDB entity for FileType, representing a file type record.
FileTypeRepository
Repository for managing FileType entities in DynamoDB.
Histogram
 
Histogram.Row
 
HostRepository
The HostRepository retrieves a list of all hosts that have reported in the last few minutes.
HubPrincipalService
The Hub implementation of the PrincipalService.
HubWSDLController
 
IAccessControlRepository<T>
The IAccessControlRepository interface supports access to access control information.
IAccessGroupRepository<T>
Repository interface for managing IAccessGroup entities.
IAllowedUserRepository<T>
Repository interface for managing IAllowedUser entities.
ICertificateStatusRepository<T>
A repository tracking certificate status information.
IDenyListRecordRepository<T>
Repository interface for managing IDenyListRecord entities.
IDestinationRepository<T>
The necessary interface for implementing a DestinationRepository
IFileTypeRepository<T>
Repository interface for managing IFileType entities.
IJurisdictionRepository<T>
The interface needed by JurisdictionService to access Jurisdiction information.
IMessageHeaderRepository<T>
The IMessageHeaderRepository interface supports access to message header records
IntegrityCheck
Utility class to compute integrity check data
IOrganizationRecordRepository<T>
Repository interface for managing IOrganizationRecord entities.
Jurisdiction
An entity to get jurisdiction information
Jurisdiction.Map
A map of jurisdictions.
JurisdictionRepository
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for Jurisdictions.
JurisdictionService
 
LogController
The LogController provides access to in memory logging data on a server.
LogController.LogControllerConfig
Configuration for Log Controller
MessageHeader
Message header captures information associated with message header values including the destination identifier, the jurisdiction, and the type of sender.
MessageHeader.Map
An alias for the message header map supporting Swagger documentation of this resource.
MessageHeaderRepository
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for MessageHeaders.
MessageHeaderService
 
Metadata
Object used to store metadata.
MetadataBuilder
This class implements the builder pattern to create Metadata for processing an ADS Request.
MetadataFault
 
MetadataImpl
Primary implementation for the Metadata interface used by the ADS Service
MockController2011
 
MockController2014
 
MockControllerBase
 
MockCredentialValidator
 
OrganizationRecord
DynamoDB entity for OrganizationRecord, representing an organization record with principal names and audit info.
OrganizationRecordRepository
Repository for managing OrganizationRecord entities in DynamoDB.
PerformanceSimulatorDailyFailures
Enables simulation of IIS performance on inbound connections to the IIS Mock Endpoint This class provides two capabilities: 1.
PerformanceSimulatorDailyFailures.ErrorType
 
PerformanceSimulatorInterface
 
PerformanceSimulatorMockIIS
This simulator mocks the behavior of a real IIS, returning RSP messages for a QBP query.
PerformanceSimulatorMultiton
This class uses the Multiton pattern to return a PerformanceSimulator given the specified performanceProfileIdentifier.
RefreshQueueService
A service to send refresh messages to other instances via SQS and await their responses.
RefreshQueueService.RefreshRequest
A refresh request message to be sent via SQS.
RefreshQueueService.RefreshResponse
A refresh response message to be sent via SQS.
RepositoryFactory
Repository Factory is used to support replacable repositories.
RestfulFileSender
This class implements the FileSender interface to Azure and the Azurite Azure emulator.
RestfulFileSender.HttpException
This class is used to throw an HttpException in derived classes where the errorStream comes from a new UrlConnection.
RestfulFileSender.SenderConfig
 
StatusCheckerService
 
StatusCheckerService.ADSChecker
 
StatusCheckScheduler
This class is used to check the status of existing connections.
StatusController
